name: Shoo Fly Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch pie plate with pastry and chill.
2. Dissolve the baking soda and water in a bowl.
3. Beat the egg yolk into the molasses mixture.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
5. Combine the remaining ingredients to make crumbs and sprinkle over the pie.
6. Bake in a preheated 400 degree Fahrenheit oven for about 10 minutes or until the crust begins to brown.
7. Reduce the temperature to 325 degrees Fahrenheit and bake until the top is firm.
